# CareerPilot AI

> AI-powered career counselor offering personalized career suggestions, skill gap analysis, salary predictions, and learning roadmaps across 40+ career domains.

CareerPilot AI helps students and professionals navigate their careers with an interactive AI assistant (Zoiee), domain-specific roadmaps, mentor connections, and job discovery tools.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of CareerPilot AI and featured career domains.
- [About](/about): What CareerPilot AI is and how it helps.
- [Assessment](/assessment): Interactive career fit assessment.
- [Personality](/personality): Personality-based career matching.
- [Skills](/skills): Skill gap analysis and recommendations.
- [Roadmap](/roadmap): Learning roadmaps for chosen careers.
- [Courses](/courses): Curated courses to build career skills.
- [Resume](/resume): AI-assisted resume builder.
- [Jobs](/jobs): Job listings and application tracking.
- [Internships](/internships): Internship opportunities.
- [Mentors](/mentors): Book sessions with career mentors.
- [Salary](/salary): Salary insights across roles and regions.
- [Scholarships](/scholarships): Scholarship opportunities.
- [Compare](/compare): Compare career domains side by side.
- [Success Stories](/success-stories): Real user journeys.
- [Resources](/resources): Guides and reference material.
- [Blog](/blog): Career insights and articles.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch with the team.

## Optional

- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Personalized dashboard (requires sign-in).
- [Workspace](/workspace): Personal workspace (requires sign-in).
